2604.15097.title: From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes: Towards Experience-Driven Test-Time Evolution
2604.15097.paper_summary: This beta technical report asks how reusable experience should be represented so that it can function as effective test-time control and as a substrate for iterative evolution. We study this question in 4.590 controlled trials across 45 scientific code-solving scenarios. We find that documentation-oriented Skill packages provide unstable control: their useful signal is sparse, and expanding a compact experience object into a fuller documentation package often fails to help and can degrade the overall average. We further show that representation itself is a first-order factor. A compact Gene representation yields the strongest overall average, remains competitive under substantial structural perturbations, and outperforms matched-budget Skill fragments, while reattaching documentation-oriented material usually weakens rather than improves it. Beyond one-shot control, we show that Gene is also a better carrier for iterative experience accumulation: attached failure history is more effective in Gene than in Skill or freeform text, editable structure matters beyond content alone, and failure information is most useful when distilled into compact warnings rather than naively appended. On CritPt, gene-evolved systems improve over their paired base models from 9.1% to 18.57% and from 17.7% to 27.14%. These results suggest that the core problem in experience reuse is not how to supply more experience, but how to encode experience as a compact, control-oriented, evolution-ready object.
2604.15097.paper_summary_zh: 這份測試技術報告探討可重用經驗應該如何表現，以便能夠作為有效的測試時控制和迭代演變的基礎。我們在45個科學代碼解決場景中進行了4,590次受控試驗來研究這個問題。我們發現，面向文檔的技能包提供的不穩定控制：它們有用的信號稀疏，將緊湊的經驗對象擴展為更完整的文檔包通常無法提供幫助，並且可能會降低整體平均水平。我們進一步顯示，表現本身是一個一級因素。緊湊的基因表示產生了最強的整體平均，並在相當大的結構擾動下保持競爭力，超越了匹配預算的技能片段，而重新附加面向文檔的材料通常會削弱而不是改善它。除了單次控制外，我們還顯示基因也是迭代經驗積累的更佳載體：附加的失敗歷史在基因中比在技能或自由形式文本中更有效，可編輯的結構超越內容本身的重要性，而失敗信息在提煉為緊湊的警告時最有用，而不是天真地附加上去。在CritPt上，基因演化的系統在其配對的基模型上改善了9.1%到18.57%和17.7%到27.14%。這些結果表明，經驗重用的核心問題不是如何提供更多的經驗，而是如何將經驗編碼為緊湊的、面向控制的、準備演變的對象。
2604.15097.author: Junjie Wang et.al.
2604.15097.authors: Junjie Wang, Yiming Ren, Haoyang Zhang
